admin.tzintuk-help: When enabled, the plugin sends a missed call that the user verifies using the last 4 digits of the calling number.
admin.user-call-help: When enabled, the user receives a verification code after calling your line.
admin.call-token-help: This token is used to identify your line in the API.
admin.call2all-token-help: The token you received from Call2All (starts with WU1BUElL).
admin.api-endpoint-help: The endpoint used for tzintuk requests.
admin.block-unverified-help: When enabled, registered users who have not verified their phone cannot create topics or replies.
admin.user-call-test-help: Creates a temporary verification code and shows it to the admin for testing.
admin.user-call-setup-help: To enable this flow, configure your main extension or the extension used for verification with the following values:
admin.refresh-token-confirm: After refreshing the token, update the extension settings on the line. Do you want to continue?
admin.prompt-username: Enter the username you want to add to the verified list:
admin.none-with-verified-note: No phone number (will be marked as verified)
admin.add-user-summary:
Action summary

Username: %1
Phone number: %2

Are you sure you want to continue?
admin.user-verified-success: User %1 was marked as verified successfully
admin.enter-phone-for-test: Enter a phone number for testing
placeholder.last-4-digits: Last 4 digits of the calling number
registration.method-tzintuk: I want to receive the code by tzintuk
registration.method-user-call: I want to call the line and hear the code
help.user-call: After clicking Send verification, call the displayed line and listen to the verification code.
help.tzintuk: You will receive a tzintuk. The verification code is the last 4 digits of the calling number.
success.user-call-ready: Your verification code is ready. Please call the line to hear it.
success.tzintuk-sent-client: The tzintuk was sent. Check your incoming calls.
success.phone-updated-verified: The phone number was updated and verified successfully
profile.current-verified-info: The current number is verified. Changing it will require verification again.
profile.enter-number-info: Enter a phone number and complete verification.
prompt.call-line-title: Call the line to hear the verification code
prompt.enter-last-4: Enter the last 4 digits of the number that just called you
dialog.choose-verification-message: You can verify by tzintuk or by a user-initiated call.
error.send-request-failed: Failed to send the verification request
error.verify-before-register: You must verify your phone number before registering
error.invalid-phone-format: Please enter a valid number in the format 05X-XXXXXXX
error.prepare-code-failed: Failed to prepare the verification code
error.verify-to-participate:
You must verify your phone number to continue participating in the forum.
Please visit your profile settings.
error.verify-to-message:
You must verify your phone number before sending messages.
Please visit your profile settings.
error.call-server-disabled: The call server is not configured
error.call-server-response: The call server returned an error
error.phone-blocked: This phone number is temporarily blocked
error.ip-blocked: This IP address is temporarily blocked
error.phone-exists-other: This phone number is already assigned to another user
error.registration-unverified: The phone number has not been verified yet. Click "Send verification" and enter the code before completing registration.
error.save-code-failed: Failed to save the verification code
success.test-code-created: A verification code was created successfully for testing
error.create-code-failed: Failed to create the verification code
error.phone-in-use: This phone number is already in use
success.tzintuk-sent: The tzintuk was sent. Please enter the last 4 digits of the calling number.
success.user-call-code-ready: Your code is ready. Please call the line to hear it.
error.phone-already-registered: This phone number is already registered in the system
inbound.auth-error: Authorization error, the token is invalid
inbound.phone-missing: The phone number is invalid or missing
inbound.code-not-found-or-expired: The verification code was not found or has expired
inbound.phone-blocked: This phone number is temporarily blocked
inbound.code-unavailable: The verification code is currently unavailable
inbound.replay: To hear this message again, press 1
